Hello R Markdown <<<<<<< HEAD /vchagas69.github.io/public/2016/07/23/hello-r-markdown/ Sat, 23 Jul 2016 21:13:14 -0500
/vchagas69.github.io/public/2016/07/23/hello-r-markdown/ ======= /vchagas69.github.io/2016/07/23/hello-r-markdown/ Sat, 23 Jul 2016 21:13:14 -0500
/vchagas69.github.io/2016/07/23/hello-r-markdown/ >>>>>>> fce113e627c1533a8ce3a8b254f5eb957259d17e R Markdown This is an R Markdown document. Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com. You can embed an R code chunk like this: summary(cars) ## speed dist ## Min. : 4.0 Min. : 2.00 ## 1st Qu.:12.0 1st Qu.: 26.00 ## Median :15.0 Median : 36.00 ## Mean :15.4 Mean : 42.98 ## 3rd Qu.

Markdown is a simple formatting syntax for authoring HTML, PDF, and MS Word documents. For more details on using R Markdown see http://rmarkdown.rstudio.com. You can embed an R code chunk like this: summary(cars) ## speed dist ## Min. : 4.0 Min. : 2.00 ## 1st Qu.:12.0 1st Qu.: 26.00 ## Median :15.0 Median : 36.00 ## Mean :15.4 Mean : 42.
